nodes.label: AI as preliminary research compass
nodes.grounding_span: I used GenAI to get an overview and a basic understanding

nodes.label: AI idea generality vs. specificity
nodes.grounding_span: most - if not, all - of the ideas were very general

nodes.label: AI training data mismatch with user level
nodes.label_negative: AI training data aligned with user level
nodes.grounding_span: The training data dictates the response to be perfectly industry standard / professional level, when most students ... have a barebones understanding

nodes.label: AI verifiability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I had the GenAI tools use and cite the sources that they used, and followed the links that they provided to validate their claims

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI in ideation for complete solution generation
nodes.grounding_span: Even having a GenAI tool that assists in coming up with partially valid ideas that can spark inspiration and innovation

nodes.label: Authentic engineering rigor and contextual understanding
nodes.grounding_span: we needed concrete evidence of having done the design and understanding the community's plight

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced workload
nodes.grounding_span: it would make finding relevant sources easier

nodes.label: Academic integrity
nodes.grounding_span: The discrepency is easy to spot, even between students

nodes.label: Strategic use of AI for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I thought that, if I used GenAI to get an overview and a basic understanding ... it would make finding relevant sources easier

nodes.label: Skepticism and caution toward AI
nodes.grounding_span: most - if not, all - of the ideas were very general and ones that the community themselves could come up with

nodes.label: Concern about AI over-reliance and training data mismatch
nodes.grounding_span: an over-reliance on the tool's training data that could compromise the user's intended purpose

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: Even having a GenAI tool that assists in coming up with partially valid ideas that can spark inspiration and innovation would be a great help

nodes.label: Strategic task decomposition based on complexity
nodes.grounding_span: I devised a plan to have a more technical solution ... and coordinated with the team accordingly

nodes.label: Systematic verification through cross-referencing
nodes.grounding_span: I had the GenAI tools use and cite the sources ... I also searched for other reports and journals ... I used both conservative and generous guessing
